name: intelli-agent
description: General-purpose multi-agent orchestrator: turns any task into parallel specialist agent swarms on a global dependency-graph scheduler — research, code, data, content, analysis, and business (marketing/sales/finance/strategy) domains. Specialized agent registry + a shared 192-persona library, runtime file-ownership locking, per-role model tiering + token/USD budget caps, dual memory (vector + cross-session), session replay, unattended/CI mode, task-level review, live dashboard. No API key. Runs in-session under Claude Code.
